search.title: Your Trusted Recommendation Portal
search.description: Discover the best products and services, recommended by a trustworthy community.
search.businessNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find a business for '{query}'.
search.locationNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find a location for '{query}'.
search.errorDesc: An error occurred during the search.
search.geolocationNotSupportedDesc: Your browser does not support geolocation.
search.taglineDesc: Discover the best products and services, recommended by a trustworthy community.
search.recommendationPortal: The recommendation portal you can trust.

directory.title: Directory
directory.description: This is the directory page. Content will be available soon.
directory.content: Welcome to the directory. We are working to bring you the best information. Check back soon!

register.title: Register with Dicilo
register.description: Join our community and discover a world of possibilities. Fill out the form to get started.
register.successDescription: Thank you for registering. We will be in touch with you shortly.
register.errorDescription: An error occurred while submitting your data. Please try again.

benefits.page_title: Benefits of Being Part of Dicilo
benefits.page_subtitle: Discover why Dicilo is the ideal platform for both companies and users who value quality and trust.

size.title: We are small
size.description: This allows us to focus on every detail and provide personalized attention to each of our members.

experience.title: We are big
experience.description: We have over 25 years of experience in the world of networking and marketing, which ensures our success and reliability.

two_reasons.title: Two great reasons to choose us
two_reasons.description: We are the meeting point where quality products and demanding consumers come together.

item1.title: Targeted Visibility
item1.description: Connect with an audience that is genuinely interested in what you offer.

item2.title: Network Expansion
item2.description: Access a global network of entrepreneurs and potential customers.

item3.title: Brand Trust
item3.description: Strengthen your image through authentic recommendations from satisfied customers.

item1.title: Exclusive Offers
item1.description: Access unique discounts on local and international products.

item2.title: Reliable Recommendations
item2.description: Make informed decisions thanks to the reviews of a trusted community.

item3.title: Rewards for Your Participation
item3.description: Benefit from your interactions and become a key part of the network.

network.title: A Unique Network in Germany
network.description: Dicilo is not just a platform; it's a complete ecosystem designed to benefit both businesses and consumers.

for_companies.title: For Businesses
for_companies.description: Dicilo is a showcase for your products and a strategic partner to help you grow. We give you the tools to reach a wider and more engaged audience.

for_users.title: For Users
for_users.description: Being part of Dicilo not only gives you access to exclusive offers, but also makes you part of a community where your opinion matters and is rewarded.

network.cta_text: Are you ready to be part of the change?

social.title: Follow us on our networks
social.description: Don't miss any of our news and special promotions. Join our digital community on your favorite platform.

pricing_page.hero_subtitle: Welcome to DICILO, the recommendation portal you can trust. Find the plan that best suits you.
pricing_page.plans_desc_1: At DICILO, we are convinced that success is achieved through genuine recommendations and a strong community.
pricing_page.plans_desc_2: That is why we have developed a platform that connects companies and buyers efficiently.
pricing_page.plans_desc_3: Whether you want to sell, buy, or donate items you no longer use, DICILO offers you a cost-effective and impactful solution.
pricing_page.plans_cta: Choose the right plan for you now and contact us!

converter.title: Euro Converter
converter.desc: Prices are in Euros. Use this converter to get an estimate in your local currency. Exchange rates are estimates and may vary.

plans.title: Private Customer
features: Receive the newsletter with the current offers.
Contact us if you want to purchase special products or services

plans.title: Donor
features: Receive the newsletter with the current offers.
Register up to 24 products per year.

plans.title: Retailer
features: Receive the newsletter with the current offers.
Register up to 300 products or services in a maximum of 4 categories
2 x recommendation newsletter per month to (potential prospects)
Attend free A.I. courses 4 x a year
1 x per month statistics about your landing page

plans.title: Premium
features: Receive the newsletter with the current offers.
Register up to 600 products or services in a maximum of 14 categories
2 x recommendation newsletter per month to (General Dicilo community)
1 x per month individual A.I. courses
2 x per month statistics about your landing page
120 social media posts monthly distributed on 6 Dicilo channels
Individual A.I. assistant on your landing page

chatbot.title: A.I. Assistant
chatbot.desc: Train your own customer service robot to answer questions about your business on your Dicilo Profile.
chatbot.greetingDesc: This message will appear when the client opens the chat.
chatbot.promptDesc: Instruct the A.I. in detail on what tone to use and what info to prioritize.
chatbot.filesDesc: Feed your A.I. with menus, catalogs, or FAQ PDFs.

campaigns.title: Custom Campaigns
campaigns.desc: Measure the performance of your email marketing and organic acquisition strategies managed in Dicilo.

market.title: Market Intelligence
market.desc: Discover demographic insights, network competitiveness, and make data-driven decisions.

geo.title: Hyperlocal Geomarketing
geo.desc: Attract customers walking near your business. Define your action radius and launch automatic PUSH notifications.
geo.privacy: Privacy Assured: Dicilo never shares exact locations...

products.title: Products and Services Management
products.desc: Add, edit, and organize the items users will see on your Dicilo profile.

messages.title: Inquiries Inbox
messages.desc: Manage the messages and leads clients send from your Dicilo Profile.

crm.title: Smart CRM & Quotes
crm.desc: Manage your commercial opportunities, build interactive quotes (Pro-formas), and send them with one click.
crm.leadsDesc: Centralized contacts from the Omnichannel Inbox.
crm.dealsDesc: Send web or PDF offers quickly by extracting data from your Dicilo catalog.
crm.kanbanDesc: Move your quotes: Draft -> Sent -> Accepted.

community.title: Your Community
community.subtitle: Explore what's happening in your neighborhood and connect with your neighbors.

ranking.no_data: Not enough data for the ranking yet.

trustboard.empty_desc: Add job ads, look for roommates, offer mentoring, or give away things you no longer use. This board is exclusive for verified residents of {{name}}.

form.dialog_desc: Publish your ad in {{name}}. Be clear and professional.
form.title: Ad Title
form.desc_ph: Detail what you offer or what you are looking for...
form.note: Note: This ad will be published in
form.note_premium: If you are a premium user, Cerebro DiciBot will automatically translate this ad to the other 11 languages.
form.success_desc: Your ad will pass through Dicilo's automatic review and will be visible soon.
form.unexpected_desc: Check your connection and try again.

trustboard_guard.general: To keep our community safe and spam-free, the "Trust Wall" requires all users to have their profile 100% validated to interact or publish.

community.explore_desc: Explore what's happening in your neighborhood and connect with your neighbors.
community.share_place: Share a place, service, or experience with your neighbors.
community.register_neighborhood_desc: Can't find your neighborhood? Register it here to start connecting with your neighbors.
